summarySection.summary: Software Engineer with a strong focus on backend development and data engineering. Proficient in Python and SQL, with a proven track record of building scalable data pipelines and backend services. Experienced in integrating React for user interfaces and optimizing workflows for real-time data processing.

experience.description:
• Developed and maintained backend services and REST APIs using Python and Django, enhancing secure workflows for financial compliance.
• Collaborated with senior engineers to design scalable architectures and data models, ensuring robust service patterns.
• Created interactive React dashboards that integrated with Django APIs, significantly improving operational visibility and data metrics.
• Optimized data-processing pipelines in Python and refined PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency and improved system performance.

projects.description:
• Engineered a comprehensive ML data pipeline for real-time sentiment analysis, processing over 1,000 Reddit finance posts per run through multi-stage ETL.
• Leveraged NLP models (FinBERT) and feature engineering to generate 40+ predictive features per ticker, training XGBoost models with 55–70% ROC-AUC.
• Developed modular components for data ingestion, transformation, and model inference, aligned with message-driven architectures for scalability.
• Automated data collection and preprocessing workflows, enabling efficient real-time analytics.

• Created an AI-driven resume platform that automates the parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured profile data.
• Developed backend services using FastAPI and PostgreSQL for parsing, authentication, and export workflows.
• Designed a real-time editing interface in React, allowing users to customize resume content seamlessly.
• Integrated OpenAI API for automated content generation, enhancing the resume extraction and editing process.

• Built a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation and transaction tracking, providing insights through a unified dashboard.
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, ensuring reliable transaction processing.
• Developed responsive React dashboards for account management and financial analytics, enhancing user experience.
• Implemented secure data handling practices (OAuth/JWT) to protect user financial data.

warnings: Skills guard restored 5 skill row(s) because Pass B exceeded the deletion budget.
